title: Union Home Minister and Minister of Cooperation Shri Amit Shah hails passage of Jan Vishwas Bill, 2026
text:
Press Release Page | Press Information Bureau

Ministry of Home Affairs

Union Home Minister and Minister of Cooperation Shri Amit Shah hails passage of Jan Vishwas Bill, 2026

Jan Vishwas Bill will accelerate Ease of Living and Ease of Business
Cutting down on several legal provisions, it makes Modi Ji's vision of New India a grand reality
It will make life easier and business simpler for all

Posted On:
03 APR 2026 10:18AM by PIB Delhi

Union Home Minister and Minister of Cooperation, Shri Amit Shah welcomed the passage of the Jan Vishwas Bill, 2026 in the Parliament.

In a post on X, Shri Amit Shah said, “The passage of the Jan Vishwas Bill 2026 in the Parliament is India's giant step towards accelerating ease of living and ease of business. Cutting down on several legal provisions, it makes Modi Ji's vision of New India a grand reality by making life easier and business simpler for all.”

The passage of the Jan Vishwas Bill 2026 in the Parliament is India's giant step towards accelerating ease of living and ease of business. Cutting down on several legal provisions, it makes Modi Ji's vision of New India a grand reality by making life easier and business simpler…
— Amit Shah (@AmitShah)
April 2, 2026

*****

RK/PR/PS/SC

(Release ID: 2248733)
